### 11. Verification properties

**1. Golden corpus.** A curated set of known-good and known-bad specimens.

**2. Assessor-runnable evidence.** The evaluator can reproduce the claim.

**3. Deterministic output.** The same tool binary, given identical input, MUST
produce byte-identical output in verification mode.

**4. Measured recall.** The false negative rate MUST be measured and published.
